zh.Sandford, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾辛德福德
zh.StJohn the Baptist Church, Broughton, La: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾鮑頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Broughton於1506年出生在英國斯塔福爾隆格頓時，他的父親Richard Broughton38歲，母親Margaret Sandford34歲。他於大約1529年與Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾鮑頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1561年10月3日在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.Sandford, Shropshire, England: 英国英格兰史洛普爾辛德福德
zh-hans.StJohn the Baptist Church, Broughton, La: 英国英格兰藍卡爾鮑頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Broughton于1506年出生在英国斯塔福爾隆格頓时，他的父亲Richard Broughton38岁，母亲Margaret Sandford34岁。他于大约1529年与Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton在英国英格兰藍卡爾鮑頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1561年10月3日在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Broughton was born in 1506, in Longdon, Staffordshire, England, his father, Richard Broughton, was 38 and his mother, Margaret Sandford, was 34. He married Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton about 1529, in Broughton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 3 October 1561, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Broughton est né en 1506, à Longdon, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Broughton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sandford, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton environ 1529, à Broughton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1561, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Broughton 1506 in Longdon, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Broughton 38 und seine Mutter Margaret Sandford 34. Er hat um 1529 in Broughton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Oktober 1561 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Broughton è nato il nel 1506 nel Longdon, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Broughton, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Sandford, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton circa 1529, nel Broughton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 ottobre 1561, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Broughtonが1506年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアロングドンで生まれた時，父Richard Broughtonは38歳，母Margaret Sandfordは34歳であった。約1529年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブロウトンでElizabeth Margaret Isabel Actonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1561年10月3日に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Broughton(이)가 1506년 영국 스태퍼드실르 론그던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Broughton(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Sandford(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 브루그h턴에서 Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1561년 10월 3일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Broughton nasceu em 1506, em Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Broughton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Sandford, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton aproximadamente 1529, em Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1561, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Broughton родился в 1506 г. в местности лонгдон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Broughton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sandford, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton около 1529 г. в местности броугтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 октября 1561 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Broughton nació en 1506, en Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Broughton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret Sandford, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton aproximadamente 1529, en Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1561, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
